---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible — include API shapes, UI mockups, or example workflows.

## Alternatives considered

What alternatives have you considered? Why did you reject them?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Scope

- **Affected apps:** [driver | admin | customer | merchant | support | backend | all]
- **Breaking change:** [yes | no]
- **Schema migration required:** [yes | no]
- **Estimated effort:** [S | M | L | XL]

## Additional context

Add any other context, links, or references here.
